scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @fragebogen/server" "npm run dev --workspace @fragebogen/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fragebogen/shared && npm run build --workspace @fragebogen/server && npm run build --workspace @fragebogen/web && node scripts/write-dist-package-types.mjs
